# Tenable OT (formerly Indegy)

## RSA Conference 2026 Field Intelligence Report: Tenable OT (formerly Indegy)

## RSA 2026
- **Booth number and hall:** Tenable is located at Booth #6155 in the North Expo Hall.
- **Any updated booth info from the conference floor:** Tenable announced Tenable Hexa AI, an agentic AI engine for their Tenable One Exposure Management Platform, at RSA Conference 2026. Demos of Tenable Hexa AI are available at their booth.

## Company Profile
- **Employee count (approximate):** Approximately 1,600 to 2,400 employees.
- **Founded year:** 2002.
- **HQ location:** 6100 Merriweather Drive, 12th Floor, Columbia, Maryland, United States.
